Hostname or IP address of the Web Gateway appliance
Management port for the reporting API

API for accessing web traffic logs, security events, threat analytics, and generating custom reports from Trellix Web Gateway (formerly McAfee Web Gateway) data. Provides access to historical traffic data, blocked requests, malware detections, and URL categorization statistics.

 Name: Trellix Support
